content.full_text:
November 22, 2002

Faith Sorenson
Department of Forestry & Fire Protection
Post Office Box 944246
Sacramento, CA 94244-2460

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-308

Dear Ms. Sorenson:

As per our telephone conversation earlier today, we are unable to provide written advice in response to your request. The Commission does not provide advice regarding past conduct. (Reg. 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A).) I enclose for your convenience, however, a Commission fact sheet that summarizes the law applicable in the context of revolving door personnel issues.

I hope you find the information helpful. If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Counsel, Legal Division
